disambiguated.context: Both a psychologist and a server had their bags searched at the airport. A drug-sniffing dog had signalled that officers should look into the bag of the psychologist and, sure enough, they found quite a bit of cocaine. After the server's bag was flagged and searched, though, they were let go as it was apparently just a false alarm.
